Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Assigning This Matter To Mandatory Judicial Arbitration
Off Calendar Aug-27-2004 Assigned To Arbitration On Sep-13-04
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Defendant Advocate Mines Limited's Motion for an Order Assigning this Matter to Mandatory Judicial Arbitration is scheduled this day. There being no appearance or an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Case is ordered removed from Trial and Mandatory Settlement Conference calendars. Court ordered Case to Judicial Arbitration pursuant to CCP 1141.11 (a). Order signed. Proceedings reported by: Patricia J. VanSteenberge. (212)
